feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Log for Financial Plan Data upload
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

While uploading Financial Plan Data there is the possibility to see the log for the uploaded Financial Plan Data. However, we are missing the information on what was uploaded, there is no information about it.

App: Import Financial Plan Data -->Open Application Log

 

Is there a possibility to get more information about it? It's crucial for us to see what values our business users have uploaded.

 

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Cannot add Search Help to Custom Field - "No suitable value help key field exists" error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I made a Custom Field in the customizing client of our dev system (S/4HANA Public Cloud - 3 system landscape) through the Custom Fields app. I have a requirement to add search help to this custom field. For this purpose, I made a custom CDS view through the Custom CDS Views app. However, when I try to bind this CDS through the "Value Help View" field, the error message "No suitable value help key field exists" appears:

 

Here is the setup of my custom CDS view:

What am I missing? Any help is welcome. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Mass changes to purchasing info record
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

while doing mass changes in info record we got error while in application job 

error message :-INSERT A MEDICATION IN THE COMPONENT MM-PUR-GF-MAS

What does it means any authorization missing or anything else on this ...?

entry.title: S/4 HANA public cloud be one of the Multi-ERP (FPC) architecture with Ariba instance
entry.content: Can Ariba integration for multi-ERP (Federated Process Control) architecture support as one of the backends  for S/4 Hana public cloud instance with other SAP back-ends technically feasible in Parent - Child Ariba realm setup?

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud | Cost Estimation by Batch
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My client (semiconductor manufacturing) is planning to use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. There is a requirement where they want to analyse costs and manage price according to batches.

This case applies to Make to Stock (MTS) process.

For Example if I have 1 Semi-Finished Goods (SFG) A with two batches A.1, A.2. Each batch is manufactured with a different cost, due to batch A.2 consumed more raw materials/overhead costs than planned. 

Next these two batches A.1, A.2 are consumed in Production Orders to produce Finished-Goods (FG). Because these 2 SFG batches have different costs, the FG manufactured by these 2 batches have different costs as well.

And they want these costs to be reflected when they choose the FG to sell to customers - that is - when they choose the FG to sell, they can choose batches in this FG, with price of each batch referenced correctly from costs collected to manufacture them.

Currently I know if we use standard price for FG, the cost for all Production Orders will be collected in Pricediff, then distributed all to inventory/COGS based on quantity. All batches of 1 FG will have same price.

Is there a way to do this in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public? I tried to use this case Solved: Batch wise costing SAP public cloud - SAP Community but the links for costing don't work, and I know SAP has removed standard cost estimation by split valuation. Mixed costing does not work as well, since all batches they use are manufacturing batches.

Kindly enlighten me on this issue.

entry.title: 在进行应收汇票的批量认领导入时，提示抵销科目的问题，提示未在公司代码中定义，请指教下，如何处理的
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance#，在进行应收汇票的批量认领导入时，提示抵销科目的问题，提示未在公司代码中定义，请指教下，如何处理的

entry.title: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Websocket RFC Server in a fenced customer network
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

is there any possibility to call a outbound service from SAP Public Cloud to a Websocket RFC server that is running in a fenced company network ? I have already called that Websocket RFC server with success but in that scenario the server must be accessible from the internet. 

Maybe there is any way to use a VPN tunnel to get that connection done? Maybe even not with Websocket RFC if that should not be possible but with HTTP or even thru BTP like:

SAP Public Cloud -> BTP (some destination or tunnel) -> external program in a fenced company network (server).

Can such scenario be accomplished at all or is it not possible?

Greetings!

entry.title: To export EPPM Project Report (Project Financial controller Overview App)
entry.content:
Hi Team,


I need an option to export the report (Project Report) as a pdf or any Document in SAP Public cloud. How to add those option. Is there any Option to customize this or do we have any app to export the report for Enterprise Project Details.

entry.title: how to check BCF accounting document in public cloud except for journal entry analyzer
entry.content:
how to check balance carry forward accounting document in public cloud except for Journal entry analyzer app.

1.Why we are enable to find these entries in the display journal entries in General Ledger and Display Line items entry apps ?
2.Additionally, in the journal entry analyzer app, we are only able to see the debit and credit line items, but not the actual document itself. Could you clarify why this is the case?

entry.title: Import on-premise S/4HANA transports into S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We would like to import S/4HANA on-premise transports into S/4HANA cloud public edition. How can we do this?

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Payment Confirmation to Customer
entry.content:
Dear Community,

is there any possibility to send an Payment Confirmation to the Customer via E-Mail?

Regards Christian

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 

FIN Accounts Receivable and Payable

entry.title: Trial Balance - Ending balance in 12.2024 not equal to opening balance in 01.2025
entry.content:
Trial Balance - Ending balance in 12.2024 not equal to opening balance in 01.2025


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Problem Statement: HTTP 403 Error in SAP CPI IFlow While Calling SAP Public Cloud OData API
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have designed an SAP CPI IFlow to call the API_MANAGE_WORKFORCE_TIMESHEET OData service in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, I am receiving an HTTP 403 Forbidden error when invoking the API.

IFlow Overview:

Steps Implemented:

  1. Get CSRF Token – Successfully fetched via a GET request.
  2. Modify Headers – Added "x-csrf-token" and "Content-Type": "application/json".
  3. Authentication – Using Basic Authentication with a Communication User.
  4. Validated Payload – JSON format is correct as per API metadata.

Issue:

  • The API responds with 403 Forbidden.

Observations:

  1. 403 Forbidden Error – The request is reaching the API but is being denied access.
  2. CSRF Token Retrieved Successfully – Indicates that token handling is correctly implemented.
  3. Basic Authentication Used – The Communication User may lack required roles or permissions.
  4. Headers Properly Set – "x-csrf-token" and "Content-Type": "application/json" are included.
  5. Correct Payload Format – Ensured as per API metadata.
  6. Tested in Postman – Working Fine – The same API call with the same credentials works in Postman but fails in SAP CPI.

Questions:

  1. Are there any additional roles required for the Communication User in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  2. Does this API require OAuth authentication instead of Basic Authentication when called from CPI?
  3. Are there any specific CPI security settings or firewall restrictions that could be blocking the request?
  4. Is there any difference in authentication behaviour between Postman and SAP CPI when calling this API?
  5. Does CPI require any special configurations for calling public cloud OData APIs (e.g., certificates, destinations, or policies)?

entry.title: Regarding multiple shipping address in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to maintain multiple shipping address for a customer in public cloud, and while creating sales order it should ask which shipping address to be used (ship to party).

so i have activated  

1. Activate Multiple address handling for customer master data in SAP BP.

2. Activate Multiple address handling in SD Documents using SAP BP:

But after activating it i have created a sales order but when trying to maintain taxes, I cant see all access sequence, only tax classification access sequence is there, I have checked the configuration in that access sequence is already maintain for the taxes, please tell what will be the issue.

entry.title: How to get configurable Material data of PR in RFQ form development
entry.content:
Hi,

    We have to build a custom RFQ adobe form which is to be utilized in SAP Public cloud. In RFQ form we have to populate the Configurable material data of respective Purchase requisition. Could you please suggest if there is any available CDS views or any other solution to get Configurable material data of respective Purchase requisition in RFQ form.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Mail in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to send an email in the public cloud. It is shown as "sent" in the Email Control app. The domain has been defined for both inbound and outbound, but the email does not arrive, neither in the spam folder nor in the inbox. I have not set up a mail server in the BTP nor created any communication arrangements, as this was not included in the Scope 1QL. What do I need to do, and where can I get the information from? See Screenshot. Or is mail Sending in the Starter System not possible? SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Thank you and best regards

entry.title: How to set different dispatch date for New and Change Purchase order in OPD
entry.content:
We would like to have dispatch date 1 - immediately for "New" purchase order and dispatch date 2 - scheduled for "Change" purchase order (with change indicator = 'X').


How do we set this up in the Output parameter determination app?


"Change indicator" is not available in the list of condition parameter.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Valuehelp for Migration
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

For the migration to the public cloud, I need to fill out the templates. I don’t have information on which values I need to map, for example, for the base quantity ISO code. On the surface, I can open the value help and see the values, but I cannot copy them. In ERP, I could use SE11 to view the value help and the values. How can I access this information in the public cloud so I can map it correctly?

Thank you!

entry.title: Cost Elements assignment at value categories of maintenance order
entry.content: Hi everyone, I have a question for CO experts. We are implementing SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition and have come across a confusing scenario. Since this is my first public cloud implementation that is why I am unsure how to proceed. On conventional on-premise systems, the PM consultant would assign cost elements in relevant SPRO nodes for both material and service related scenarios. Now, on public cloud, I am told that the PM consultant does not need to assign cost elements because they would be automatically reflected in the given configuration of costing for maintenance orders. The chart of account has been uploaded in the system and the cost elements which are specified for maintenance order scenarios (material and service) will be assigned automatically. Please refer to the screenshot below.

entry.title: Can Rapid FP&A be used with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise, and how to configure Standard CDS?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on implementing Rapid FP&A in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise. The documentation I’ve come across primarily mentions SAP S/4HANA Public & Private Cloud Editions, but I haven’t found clear guidance for S/4HANA On-Premise.

My Key Questions:
Can we use the Rapid FP&A Suite with the 2022 On-Premise version of S/4HANA?
The documentation and resources mention connectivity primarily for cloud editions, and I would like confirmation on whether the suite is compatible with on-premise.
Steps to Configure Standard CDS Views for On-Premise:
I am trying to configure the Standard CDS (for example, GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery found in the SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan model) in our on-premise S/4HANA environment.
We are facing issues, such as permissions errors and inability to refresh queries, which seem to be cloud-related setups. However, we are on S/4HANA On-Premise 2022.

I've looked for existing Standard CDS views related to FP&A in our on-premise system, but I haven't found relevant resources specific to on-premise.
Encountered a permission issue with GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery during refresh attempts (attached error).


Can the community help clarify whether the Rapid FP&A suite can be used with S/4HANA On-Premise?
If so, could you guide me through the steps required to configure the relevant Standard CDS views (or build custom ones) for FP&A models on-premise?
Any detailed steps, documentation, or guidance would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help.
